def strat(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['Close']
    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    open_ = df['Open']
    volume = df['Volume']
    n = len(df)

    # --- EMA ---
    ema_fast = close.ewm(span=12, adjust=False).mean()
    ema_slow = close.ewm(span=26, adjust=False).mean()
    ema_200 = close.ewm(span=200, adjust=False).mean()

    # --- MACD ---
    macd_line = ema_fast - ema_slow
    signal_line = macd_line.ewm(span=9, adjust=False).mean()
    macd_hist = macd_line - signal_line

    # --- RSI (14) ---
    delta = close.diff()
    gain = delta.clip(lower=0)
    loss = -delta.clip(upper=0)
    avg_gain = gain.ewm(com=13, adjust=False).mean()
    avg_loss = loss.ewm(com=13, adjust=False).mean()
    rs = avg_gain / (avg_loss + 1e-10)
    rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))

    # --- Stochastic (14,3,3) ---
    stoch_period = 14
    lowest_low = low.rolling(stoch_period).min()
    highest_high = high.rolling(stoch_period).max()
    stoch_k = 100 * (close - lowest_low) / (highest_high - lowest_low + 1e-10)
    stoch_d = stoch_k.rolling(3).mean()
    stoch_k_smooth = stoch_k.rolling(3).mean()

    # --- Bollinger Bands (20, 2) ---
    bb_period = 20
    bb_mid = close.rolling(bb_period).mean()
    bb_std = close.rolling(bb_period).std()
    bb_upper = bb_mid + 2 * bb_std
    bb_lower = bb_mid - 2 * bb_std
    bb_width = (bb_upper - bb_lower) / (bb_mid + 1e-10)

    # --- Money Flow Index (14) ---
    mfi_period = 14
    typical_price = (high + low + close) / 3
    raw_money_flow = typical_price * volume
    tp_diff = typical_price.diff()
    pos_flow = raw_money_flow.where(tp_diff > 0, 0.0)
    neg_flow = raw_money_flow.where(tp_diff < 0, 0.0)
    pos_mf = pos_flow.rolling(mfi_period).sum()
    neg_mf = neg_flow.rolling(mfi_period).sum()
    mfi = 100 - (100 / (1 + pos_mf / (neg_mf + 1e-10)))

    # --- Candlestick Patterns ---
    body = close - open_
    body_abs = body.abs()
    candle_range = high - low + 1e-10
    upper_shadow = high - pd.concat([close, open_], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    lower_shadow = pd.concat([close, open_], axis=1).min(axis=1) - low

    # Bullish engulfing
    prev_body = body.shift(1)
    prev_open = open_.shift(1)

def strat(df):
    n = len(df)
    pos = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)

    # Parameters
    adx_period = 14
    adx_threshold = 20
    kc_period = 20
    kc_atr_mult = 2.0
    bb_period = 20
    bb_std = 2.0
    atr_period = 14
    delay = 1  # delay bars to avoid chasing momentum

    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    close = df['Close']

    # --- ATR ---
    tr = pd.concat([
        high - low,
        (high - close.shift(1)).abs(),
        (low - close.shift(1)).abs()
    ], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    atr = tr.ewm(span=atr_period, adjust=False).mean()

    # --- ADX / DI calculation ---
    up_move = high.diff()
    down_move = -low.diff()

    plus_dm = np.where((up_move > down_move) & (up_move > 0), up_move, 0.0)
    minus_dm = np.where((down_move > up_move) & (down_move > 0), down_move, 0.0)

    plus_dm_s = pd.Series(plus_dm, index=df.index).ewm(span=adx_period, adjust=False).mean()
    minus_dm_s = pd.Series(minus_dm, index=df.index).ewm(span=adx_period, adjust=False).mean()

    atr_smooth = atr.copy()

    plus_di = 100 * plus_dm_s / atr_smooth.replace(0, np.nan)
    minus_di = 100 * minus_dm_s / atr_smooth.replace(0, np.nan)

    dx = (100 * (plus_di - minus_di).abs() / (plus_di + minus_di).replace(0, np.nan))
    adx = dx.ewm(span=adx_period, adjust=False).mean()

    # --- Keltner Channel ---
    kc_mid = close.rolling(kc_period).mean()
    kc_upper = kc_mid + kc_atr_mult * atr
    kc_lower = kc_mid - kc_atr_mult * atr

    # --- Bollinger Bands ---

    bb_std_s = close.rolling(bb_period).std()
    bb_upper = bb_mid + bb_std * bb_std_s
    bb_lower = bb_mid - bb_std * bb_std_s

    # --- Vigor Filter: close > open (bullish bar) or close < open (bearish bar) ---
    bar_vigor = close - df['Open']

    # --- Signal generation ---
    # Long: ADX > threshold, +DI > -DI, close breaks above Keltner upper or BB upper, vigor positive
    # Short: ADX > threshold, -DI > +DI, close breaks below Keltner lower or BB lower, vigor negative

    long_signal = (
        (adx > adx_threshold) &
        (plus_di > minus_di) &
        ((close > kc_upper) | (close > bb_upper)) &
        (bar_vigor > 0)
    )

    short_signal = (
        (adx > adx_threshold) &
        (minus_di > plus_di) &
        ((close

def strat(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['Close']
    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    volume = df['Volume']
    n = len(df)

    # --- ADX Calculation ---
    def calc_adx(high, low, close, period=14):
        tr = pd.concat([
            high - low,
            (high - close.shift(1)).abs(),
            (low - close.shift(1)).abs()
        ], axis=1).max(axis=1)
        atr = tr.ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()

        up_move = high - high.shift(1)
        down_move = low.shift(1) - low

        plus_dm = np.where((up_move > down_move) & (up_move > 0), up_move, 0.0)
        minus_dm = np.where((down_move > up_move) & (down_move > 0), down_move, 0.0)

        plus_dm_s = pd.Series(plus_dm, index=close.index).ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()
        minus_dm_s = pd.Series(minus_dm, index=close.index).ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()

        plus_di = 100 * plus_dm_s / atr.replace(0, np.nan)
        minus_di = 100 * minus_dm_s / atr.replace(0, np.nan)

        dx = 100 * (plus_di - minus_di).abs() / (plus_di + minus_di).replace(0, np.nan)
        adx = dx.ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()
        return adx, plus_di, minus_di

    # --- VWAP (rolling 20-bar) ---
    def calc_vwap(close, volume, period=20):
        tp = close
        vwap = (tp * volume).rolling(period).sum() / volume.rolling(period).sum()
        return vwap

    # --- MFI ---
    def calc_mfi(high, low, close, volume, period=14):
        tp = (high + low + close) / 3.0
        raw_mf = tp * volume
        pos_mf = raw_mf.where(tp > tp.shift(1), 0.0)
        neg_mf = raw_mf.where(tp < tp.shift(1), 0.0)
        pos_sum = pos_mf.rolling(period).sum()
        neg_sum = neg_mf.rolling(period).sum()
        mfr = pos_sum / neg_sum.replace(0, np.nan)
        mfi = 100 - (100 / (1 + mfr))
        return mfi

    # --- Parabolic SAR ---
    def calc_psar(high, low, af_start=0.02, af_step=0.02, af_max=0.2):
        psar = close.copy()
        bull = True
        iaf = af_start
        ep = low.iloc[0]
        hp = high.iloc[0]
        lp = low.iloc[0]
        psar_vals = np.zeros(n)
        psar_vals[0] = low.iloc[0]

        for i in range(1, n):
            if bull:
                psar_vals[i] = psar_vals[i-1] + iaf * (hp - psar_vals[i-1])
                psar

def strat(df):
    # Parameters
    atr_long_period = 120   # 120-bar ATR (120-minute lookback on 1-min bars)
    atr_short_period = 5    # 5-bar ATR (5-minute)
    sma_period = 20         # 20-bar SMA
    trend_window = 5        # 5-bar price change window
    volatility_multiplier = 2.0
    take_profit = 0.04      # 4%
    stop_loss = 0.04        # 4%
    pause_bars = 30         # 30-bar pause after high volatility

    n = len(df)
    positions = np.zeros(n)

    # --- Compute True Range ---
    high = df['High'].values
    low = df['Low'].values
    close = df['Close'].values
    open_ = df['Open'].values

    tr = np.zeros(n)
    tr[0] = high[0] - low[0]
    for i in range(1, n):
        tr[i] = max(high[i] - low[i],
                    abs(high[i] - close[i-1]),
                    abs(low[i] - close[i-1]))

    # --- Compute ATRs using rolling mean ---
    atr_long = np.full(n, np.nan)
    atr_short = np.full(n, np.nan)

    for i in range(atr_long_period - 1, n):
        atr_long[i] = np.mean(tr[i - atr_long_period + 1: i + 1])

    for i in range(atr_short_period - 1, n):
        atr_short[i] = np.mean(tr[i - atr_short_period + 1: i + 1])

    # --- Compute 20-bar SMA ---
    sma = np.full(n, np.nan)
    for i in range(sma_period - 1, n):
        sma[i] = np.mean(close[i - sma_period + 1: i + 1])

    # --- Strategy Logic ---
    position = 0          # current position: 1, 0, -1
    entry_price = 0.0
    pause_counter = 0     # bars remaining in pause

    min_start = max(atr_long_period, atr_short_period, sma_period, trend_window)

    for i in range(n):
        if i < min_start:
            positions[i] = 0
            continue

        current_close = close[i]
        current_atr_long = atr_long[i]
        current_atr_short = atr_short[i]
        current_sma = sma[i]

        # Check for valid indicators
        if np.isnan(current_atr_long) or np.isnan(current_atr_short) or np.isnan(current_sma):
            positions[i] = position
            continue

        # Detect high volatility
        high_volatility = current_atr_short > volatility_multiplier * current_atr_long

        # --- Manage existing position: check TP/SL ---
        if position != 0:
            if position == 1:
                pnl = (current_close - entry_price) / entry_price
                if pnl >= take_profit or pnl <= -stop_loss:
                    position = 0
                    entry_price = 0.0
                    if pnl <= -stop_loss or high_

def strat(df):
    close = df['Close']
    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    open_ = df['Open']
    volume = df['Volume']

    n = len(df)
    pos = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)

    # --- Indicators ---

    # 8-period EMA
    ema8 = close.ewm(span=8, adjust=False).mean()

    # VWAP approximation (daily rolling using cumulative typical price * volume / cumulative volume)
    typical_price = (high + low + close) / 3.0
    cum_tp_vol = (typical_price * volume).cumsum()
    cum_vol = volume.cumsum()
    vwap = cum_tp_vol / cum_vol

    # Previous day close (shift by 1)
    prev_close = close.shift(1)

    # Previous day high and low
    prev_high = high.shift(1)
    prev_low = low.shift(1)

    # Gap up: today's open is 3%+ above previous close
    gap_up = (open_ - prev_close) / prev_close.replace(0, np.nan)

    # Trend confirmation: close above 8 EMA
    above_ema8 = close > ema8

    # Price above VWAP (bullish)
    above_vwap = close > vwap

    # Red day: close < open
    is_red = close < open_

    # Green day: close >= open
    is_green = close >= open_

    # First green day after 2+ consecutive red days
    # Count consecutive red days ending at previous bar
    consec_red = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    for i in range(1, n):
        if is_red.iloc[i - 1]:
            consec_red.iloc[i] = consec_red.iloc[i - 1] + 1
        else:
            consec_red.iloc[i] = 0

    first_green_after_reds = is_green & (consec_red >= 2)

    # Red-to-green move: previous bar was red, current bar is green and above prev close
    red_to_green = is_green & is_red.shift(1).fillna(False) & (close > prev_close)

    # Break above previous day high (momentum breakout)
    breakout_prev_high = close > prev_high

    # Support: price bouncing off VWAP (low touched near VWAP but close above it)
    vwap_pullback = (low <= vwap * 1.005) & (close > vwap)

    # --- Entry Conditions ---
    # Long entry signals:
    # 1. Gap up 3%+ AND above EMA8 AND above VWAP (gap up momentum)
    signal_gap_up = (gap_up >= 0.03) & above_ema8 & above_vwap

    # 2. First green day after 2+ red days AND above EMA8 AND above VWAP
    signal_first_green = first_green_after_reds & above_ema8 & above_vwap

    # 3. Red-to-green move AND above EMA8 AND above VWAP
    signal_rtg = red_to_green & above_ema8 & above_vwap

    # 4. Breakout above previous day high AND above EMA8 AND above VWAP (strong uptrend)
    signal_breakout = breakout_prev_high & above_ema8 & above_v

def strat(df):
    close = df['Close']
    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    
    n = len(df)
    positions = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Calculate momentum as percentage change in closing price
    momentum = close.pct_change() * 100
    
    # Track active trade state
    in_trade = False
    entry_price = 0.0
    entry_bar = -1
    holding_period = 4  # 4 periods
    profit_target_pct = 0.01  # 1% gain
    stop_loss_pct = 0.01      # 1% loss
    momentum_threshold = 0.5  # +0.5%
    
    for i in range(1, n):
        if in_trade:
            # Check exit conditions using current bar's high and low
            profit_target_price = entry_price * (1 + profit_target_pct)
            stop_loss_price = entry_price * (1 - stop_loss_pct)
            
            bars_held = i - entry_bar
            
            # Check stop loss (low touched stop)
            if low.iloc[i] <= stop_loss_price:
                in_trade = False
                positions.iloc[i] = 0
            # Check profit target (high touched target)
            elif high.iloc[i] >= profit_target_price:
                in_trade = False
                positions.iloc[i] = 0
            # Check holding period expiry
            elif bars_held >= holding_period:
                in_trade = False
                positions.iloc[i] = 0
            else:
                positions.iloc[i] = 1
        else:
            # Check entry condition: momentum exceeds +0.5% threshold
            if momentum.iloc[i] > momentum_threshold:
                in_trade = True
                entry_price = df['Open'].iloc[i]
                entry_bar = i
                positions.iloc[i] = 1
            else:
                positions.iloc[i] = 0
    
    return positions

def strat(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['Close']
    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    volume = df['Volume']
    n = len(df)

    # Parameters
    swing_lookback = 10       # bars to look back for swing low/high detection
    avwap_period = 50         # max bars for AVWAP calculation window
    momentum_period = 14      # momentum confirmation
    vol_ma_period = 20        # volume moving average

    pos = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)

    # Helper: compute AVWAP from anchor index to current bar
    def compute_avwap(anchor_idx, current_idx):
        if anchor_idx >= current_idx:
            return np.nan
        c = close.iloc[anchor_idx:current_idx+1].values
        v = volume.iloc[anchor_idx:current_idx+1].values
        cum_vol = np.cumsum(v)
        if cum_vol[-1] == 0:
            return np.nan
        cum_pv = np.cumsum(c * v)
        return cum_pv[-1] / cum_vol[-1]

    # Detect swing lows: local minimum over lookback bars
    def is_swing_low(i, lb):
        if i < lb:
            return False
        window_low = low.iloc[i-lb:i].values
        return low.iloc[i] < np.min(window_low)

    # Detect swing highs: local maximum over lookback bars
    def is_swing_high(i, lb):
        if i < lb:
            return False
        window_high = high.iloc[i-lb:i].values
        return high.iloc[i] > np.max(window_high)

    # Precompute volume moving average for volume spike detection
    vol_ma = volume.rolling(vol_ma_period, min_periods=1).mean()

    # Precompute momentum (rate of change)
    roc = close.pct_change(momentum_period)

    # Track anchor points
    long_anchor = None   # anchor index for long AVWAP
    short_anchor = None  # anchor index for short AVWAP

    current_position = 0

    for i in range(max(swing_lookback, momentum_period, vol_ma_period), n):
        c = close.iloc[i]
        v = volume.iloc[i]
        vm = vol_ma.iloc[i]
        mom = roc.iloc[i] if not np.isnan(roc.iloc[i]) else 0.0

        # Detect new swing low anchor (potential long entry anchor)
        if is_swing_low(i, swing_lookback):
            long_anchor = i

        # Detect new swing high anchor (potential short entry anchor)
        if is_swing_high(i, swing_lookback):
            short_anchor = i

        # Compute AVWAP from anchors
        avwap_long = np.nan
        avwap_short = np.nan

        if long_anchor is not None and long_anchor < i:
            # Limit AVWAP window to avwap_period bars
            effective_anchor = max(long_anchor, i - avwap_period)
            avwap_long = compute_avwap(effective_anchor, i)

        if short_anchor is not None and short_anchor < i:
            effective_anchor_s = max(short_anchor, i - avwap_period)
            avwap_short = compute_avwap(effective_anchor_s, i)

        #

def strat(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['Close']
    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    n = len(df)

    # Parameters
    swing_lookback = 20  # bars to look back for swing high/low
    fib_138 = 1.382
    fib_162 = 1.618
    fib_200 = 2.000

    positions = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)

    # We need at least 2*swing_lookback bars
    if n < 2 * swing_lookback:
        return positions

    for i in range(2 * swing_lookback, n):
        # Look at the window ending at bar i
        window_high = high.iloc[i - swing_lookback: i]
        window_low = low.iloc[i - swing_lookback: i]

        swing_high = window_high.max()
        swing_low = window_low.min()

        swing_high_idx = window_high.idxmax()
        swing_low_idx = window_low.idxmin()

        swing_range = swing_high - swing_low
        if swing_range == 0:
            continue

        current_close = close.iloc[i]

        # Determine trend direction: if swing low came before swing high => uptrend
        # if swing high came before swing low => downtrend
        sh_pos = df.index.get_loc(swing_high_idx)
        sl_pos = df.index.get_loc(swing_low_idx)

        if sl_pos < sh_pos:
            # Uptrend: Fibonacci extensions above swing high
            # Extensions measured from swing low to swing high, projected beyond swing high
            ext_138 = swing_low + fib_138 * swing_range
            ext_162 = swing_low + fib_162 * swing_range
            ext_200 = swing_low + fib_200 * swing_range

            # Entry: price is above swing high (breakout) but below 138 extension
            if current_close > swing_high and current_close < ext_138:
                positions.iloc[i] = 1
            # Exit zones: at or above 138 extension, reduce/exit
            elif current_close >= ext_138 and current_close < ext_162:
                # Partial profit at 138 - still hold partial (use 0 as flat for simplicity)
                positions.iloc[i] = 0
            elif current_close >= ext_162 and current_close < ext_200:
                positions.iloc[i] = 0
            elif current_close >= ext_200:

strategy_name: Multi-Level Weighted OFI (Order Flow Imbalance) High Frequency Trading Bot
source:
def strat(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    pos = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)

    if len(df) < 30:
        return pos

    close = df['Close']
    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    volume = df['Volume']
    open_ = df['Open']

    # Simulate multi-level weighted OFI using OHLCV data
    # OFI proxy: bid volume ~ volume when close > open (buying pressure)
    #            ask volume ~ volume when close < open (selling pressure)
    # Weight by price level proximity (simulate depth levels 1-15)

    n = len(df)
    ofi = pd.Series(0.0, index=df.index)

    for level in range(1, 16):
        weight = 1.0 / level  # higher weight for closer levels
        # Simulate bid/ask split at each depth level using bar structure
        bar_range = high - low
        bar_range = bar_range.replace(0, np.nan).fillna(1e-8)

        # Bid volume proxy: fraction of bar that closed in upper half
        close_position = (close - low) / bar_range
        bid_vol = volume * close_position * weight
        ask_vol = volume * (1 - close_position) * weight

        # Add noise variation per level using open-close relationship
        level_factor = (close - open_) / bar_range.clip(lower=1e-8)
        level_ofi = (bid_vol - ask_vol) * (1 + level_factor * 0.1 * level)
        ofi += level_ofi

    # Normalize OFI
    ofi_mean = ofi.rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).mean()
    ofi_std = ofi.rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).std().replace(0, np.nan).fillna(1e-8)
    ofi_zscore = (ofi - ofi_mean) / ofi_std

    # OFI velocity (first derivative)
    ofi_velocity = ofi.diff(1)
    vel_mean = ofi_velocity.rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).mean()
    vel_std = ofi_velocity.rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).std().replace(0, np.nan).fillna(1e-8)
    vel_zscore = (ofi_velocity - vel_mean) / vel_std

    # OFI acceleration (second derivative)
    ofi_accel = ofi_velocity.diff(1)
    acc_mean = ofi_accel.rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).mean()
    acc_std = ofi_accel.rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).std().replace(0, np.nan).fillna(1e-8)
    acc_zscore = (ofi_accel - acc_mean) / acc_std

    # Volume surge detection (1.2x - 2x average)
    vol_avg = volume.rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).mean()
    vol_ratio = volume / vol_avg.replace(0, np.nan).fillna(1e-8)
    volume_surge = (vol_ratio >= 1.2) & (vol_ratio <= 2.0)

    # Z-score regime detection
    # Extreme OFI event: |z-score| > 2.0
    ofi_extreme_long = ofi_zscore > 2.0
    ofi_extreme_short = ofi_zscore < -2.0

def strat(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    open_ = df['Open']
    volume = df['Volume']

    body = (close - open_).abs()

    # Proxy for long liquidations: sharp down moves with high volume (longs get liquidated)
    # Proxy for short liquidations: sharp up moves with high volume (shorts get liquidated)

def strat(df):
    pos = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    n = len(df)
    if n < 20:
        return pos
    
    # Parameters
    swing_lookback = 20      # bars to look back for swing high/low
    fib_382 = 0.382
    fib_500 = 0.500
    fib_618 = 0.618
    fib_786 = 0.786
    ext_100 = 1.000
    ext_618 = 1.618
    
    closes = df['Close'].values
    highs = df['High'].values
    lows = df['Low'].values
    
    current_pos = 0
    swing_low = None
    swing_high = None
    swing_low_idx = None
    swing_high_idx = None
    trade_direction = None  # 'long' or 'short'
    entry_price = None
    tp1 = None   # 1.0 extension
    tp2 = None   # 1.618 extension
    stop = None
    
    def find_swing_low(idx, lookback):
        start = max(0, idx - lookback)
        window_lows = lows[start:idx+1]
        min_idx = np.argmin(window_lows) + start
        return min_idx, lows[min_idx]
    
    def find_swing_high(idx, lookback):
        start = max(0, idx - lookback)
        window_highs = highs[start:idx+1]
        max_idx = np.argmax(window_highs) + start
        return max_idx, highs[max_idx]
    
    positions = np.zeros(n, dtype=int)
    
    for i in range(swing_lookback, n):
        c = closes[i]
        h = highs[i]
        l = lows[i]
        
        # Manage existing position
        if current_pos == 1:
            # Long position: check take profit or stop
            if h >= tp2:
                current_pos = 0
                trade_direction = None
            elif h >= tp1:
                # Partial exit at 1.0 extension, move stop to breakeven
                stop = entry_price
            elif l <= stop:
                current_pos = 0
                trade_direction = None
            positions[i] = current_pos
            continue
        
        elif current_pos == -1:
            # Short position: check take profit or stop
            if l <= tp2:
                current_pos = 0
                trade_direction = None
            elif l <= tp1:
                stop = entry_price
            elif h >= stop:
                current_pos = 0
                trade_direction = None
            positions[i] = current_pos
            continue
        
        # No position: look for setup
        # Identify recent swing high and swing low
        sh_idx, sh_val = find_swing_high(i - 1, swing_lookback)
        sl_idx, sl_val = find_swing_low(i - 1, swing_lookback)
        
        # Determine if we have an uptrend (swing low before swing high)
        # or downtrend (swing high before swing low)
        
        if sl_idx < sh_idx:
            # Uptrend: impulsive move from swing low to swing high
            # Look for retracement into 0.382-0.618 zone (long entry)
            move = sh_val - sl_val
            if move <= 0:
                positions[i] = 0
                continue

def strat(df):
    # Calculate gap up: today's Open is higher than yesterday's Close
    prev_close = df['Close'].shift(1)
    gap_up = df['Open'] > prev_close
    
    # Enter long on gap up days, exit same day (position = 1 on gap up, 0 otherwise)
    # Since backtester shifts positions by one bar, we signal on the current bar
    # A gap up is detected at the open of the current bar
    positions = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    positions[gap_up] = 1
    
    return positions

        swing_l = []

                swing_h.append(highs[i])
            if all(lows[i] <= lows[i-j] for j in range(1, window+1)) and \
               all(lows[i] <= lows[i+j] for j in range(1, window+1)):
                swing_l.append(lows[i])
        return swing_h, swing_l

    def is_reverse_hammer(o, h, l, c):
        body = abs(c - o)
        candle_range = h - l
        if candle_range == 0:
            return False
        upper_shadow = h - max(o, c)
        lower_shadow = min(o, c) - l
        # Reverse hammer: small body at bottom, long upper shadow, small lower shadow
        return (upper_shadow >= 2 * body and 
                lower_shadow <= 0.1 * candle_range and 
                body <= 0.3 * candle_range)
    
    def is_doji(o, h, l, c):
        body = abs(c - o)
        candle_range = h - l

        return body <= 0.1 * candle_range

def strat(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    n = len(df)
    positions = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)

    # Parameters
    atr_period = 14
    lookback = 20          # bars to look back for swing highs/lows
    pattern_window = 10    # bars to look for double top/bottom formation
    tolerance = 0.003      # 0.3% tolerance for double top/bottom matching
    rr_ratio = 1.4         # reward-to-risk ratio

    # Compute ATR
    high = df['High'].values
    low = df['Low'].values
    close = df['Close'].values
    open_ = df['Open'].values

    tr = np.zeros(n)
    for i in range(1, n):
        tr[i] = max(high[i] - low[i],
                    abs(high[i] - close[i-1]),
                    abs(low[i] - close[i-1]))
    tr[0] = high[0] - low[0]

    atr = np.zeros(n)
    atr[atr_period-1] = np.mean(tr[:atr_period])
    for i in range(atr_period, n):
        atr[i] = (atr[i-1] * (atr_period - 1) + tr[i]) / atr_period

    # Identify swing highs and swing lows
    swing_high = np.zeros(n, dtype=bool)
    swing_low = np.zeros(n, dtype=bool)
    sw = 3  # swing window
    for i in range(sw, n - sw):
        if high[i] == max(high[i-sw:i+sw+1]):
            swing_high[i] = True
        if low[i] == min(low[i-sw:i+sw+1]):
            swing_low[i] = True

    # Identify support/resistance zones based on multiple tests
    # A zone is significant if it has been tested 2+ times in recent lookback
    def is_resistance_zone(idx, price, window=40, tol=0.005):
        count = 0
        for j in range(max(0, idx - window), idx):
            if swing_high[j] and abs(high[j] - price) / price < tol:
                count += 1
        return count >= 2

    def is_support_zone(idx, price, window=40, tol=0.005):
        count = 0
        for j in range(max(0, idx - window), idx):
            if swing_low[j] and abs(low[j] - price) / price < tol:
                count += 1
        return count >= 2

    # Track active trades
    in_trade = False
    trade_direction = 0
    stop_loss = 0.0
    take_profit = 0.0

    for i in range(lookback + atr_period, n):
        if atr[i] == 0:
            continue

        # Check exit conditions for active trade
        if in_trade:
            if trade_direction == 1:
                # Long: check stop or target
                if low[i] <= stop_loss:
                    positions.iloc[i] = 0
                    in_trade = False
                    trade_direction = 0
                elif high[i] >= take_profit:
                    positions.iloc[i] = 0
                    in_trade = False
                    trade_direction = 0
                else:
                    positions.iloc[i] = 1
            elif trade_direction

def strat(df):
    close = df['Close']
    high = df['High']
    low = df['Low']
    open_ = df['Open']
    n = len(df)

    # 50-period moving average
    ma50 = close.rolling(50).mean()

    # Support and resistance zones using rolling windows
    lookback_sr = 20
    resistance = high.rolling(lookback_sr).max()
    support = low.rolling(lookback_sr).min()

    # Mid-term support/resistance (higher timeframe proxy using longer window)
    lookback_ht = 60
    ht_resistance = high.rolling(lookback_ht).max()
    ht_support = low.rolling(lookback_ht).min()

    # ATR for dynamic thresholds
    tr = pd.concat([
        high - low,
        (high - close.shift(1)).abs(),
        (low - close.shift(1)).abs()
    ], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    atr = tr.rolling(14).mean()

    # 1-2-3 pattern detection (simplified):
    # Point 1: swing high/low
    # Point 2: reversal
    # Point 3: pullback that doesn't exceed point 1
    # Confirmed when price breaks point 2

    swing_window = 5

    # Detect local swing highs and lows
    swing_high = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)
    swing_low = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)

    for i in range(swing_window, n - swing_window):
        if high.iloc[i] == high.iloc[i - swing_window:i + swing_window + 1].max():
            swing_high.iloc[i] = True
        if low.iloc[i] == low.iloc[i - swing_window:i + swing_window + 1].min():
            swing_low.iloc[i] = True

    # Double bottom detection: two lows at similar level within a window
    db_window = 15
    double_bottom = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)
    double_top = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)

    for i in range(db_window, n):
        window_lows = low.iloc[i - db_window:i]
        window_highs = high.iloc[i - db_window:i]
        min1 = window_lows.min()
        max1 = window_highs.max()
        tol = atr.iloc[i] * 0.5 if not np.isnan(atr.iloc[i]) else 0.001

        # Double bottom: current low near previous min
        if abs(low.iloc[i] - min1) < tol and swing_low.iloc[i]:
            double_bottom.iloc[i] = True

        # Double top: current high near previous max
        if abs(high.iloc[i] - max1) < tol and swing_high.iloc[i]:
            double_top.iloc[i] = True

    # Pullback into broken support/resistance
    # Broken resistance becomes support (bullish pullback)
    # Broken support becomes resistance (bearish pullback)
    pullback_bull = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)
    pullback_bear = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)

    for i in range(lookback_sr + 1, n):
        prev_res = resistance.iloc[i - 1]
        prev_sup = support.iloc[i - 1]
        tol = atr.iloc[i] * 0.
